ogTitle: Worrigee vs Woy Woy: Climate Safety

heading: Worrigee vs Woy Woy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Worrigee, New South Wales and Woy Woy, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Worrigee has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Woy Woy (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Worrigee or Woy Woy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Worrigee has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Woy Woy scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Worrigee scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Woy Woy scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Worrigee or Woy Woy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Worrigee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
